properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v2 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You know that I love You You know that I want to know You so much more More than I have before These words are from my heart These words are not made up I will live for You I am devoted to You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: King of Majesty I have one desire Just to be with You my Lord Just to be with You my Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus you are the Saviour of my soul And forever and ever I'll give my praises to You
